query.query: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `gcp-project-redacted.contractforge_gcp_azure_sql_ops.contractforge_lineage_evidence` ( run_id STRING NOT NULL, target_table STRING NOT NULL, source_name STRING NOT NULL, event_json STRING NOT NULL, event_time TIMESTAMP, adapter STRING NOT NULL )

CREATE OR REPLACE TABLE `gcp-project-redacted.contractforge_gcp_azure_sql_ops.cf_schema_probe_9727dffff292` AS SELECT * FROM ( SELECT CAST(order_id AS STRING) AS order_id, TRIM(CAST(customer_name AS STRING)) AS customer_name, CAST(amount AS FLOAT64) AS amount, CASE WHEN CAST(amount AS FLOAT64) >= 100 THEN 'high' WHEN CAST(amount AS FLOAT64) >= 25 THEN 'medium' ELSE 'low' END AS amount_band, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() AS normalized_at_utc FROM `gcp-project-redacted.contractforge_gcp_azure_sql_bronze.b_azure_sql_orders` ) AS contractforge_schema_source WHERE FALSE

SELECT column_name, data_type, is_nullable, ordinal_position FROM `gcp-project-redacted.contractforge_gcp_azure_sql_ops.INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS` WHERE table_name = 'cf_schema_probe_9727dffff292' ORDER BY ordinal_position

warnings.message: Additive schema policy requires adapter-managed schema evolution.

GCP BigQuery is stable-final for the documented batch BigQuery surface. Streaming, advanced write modes, non-Workflows deployment runners, automatic native Dataplex lineage/aspect emission during every contract run, raw Iceberg paths, JDBC/Delta Sharing and live governance-ledger reconciliation are explicitly outside this scoped claim.
